mapper.select: SELECT p.post_id , p.user_id , p.category_id , p.title , p.content , p.max_members , p.status , p.view_count , p.created_at , p.updated_at , u.name AS writer_name , c.category_name FROM study_posts p JOIN user_account u ON p.user_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN categories c ON p.category_id = c.category_id ORDER BY p.post_id DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{size} ROWS ONLY

SELECT p.post_id , p.user_id , p.category_id , p.title , p.content , p.max_members , p.status , p.view_count , p.created_at , p.updated_at , u.name AS writer_name , c.category_name FROM study_posts p JOIN user_account u ON p.user_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN categories c ON p.category_id = c.category_id WHERE p.post_id = #{postId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO study_posts ( post_id, user_id, category_id, title, content, max_members, status, view_count, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( seq_study_posts.NEXTVAL, #{userId}, #{categoryId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{maxMembers}, 'OPEN', 0, SYSDATE, SYSDATE )
